title: Caerula Arbor
description: Adapted from Mitsuki and Caerula Arbor from Arknights, which adds varieties of water mobs invading the Land.
body:
![Mod Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eacf0752b73c5fa9c5940d3d12d5ae0d1f001e1.png)
_**Seaborn**, as the name suggests, is a powerful species from the ocean._

_Unfortunately, now they tend to invade the Land, swallow all the livings and occupy the Overworld._

From game Arknights, which are adapted to suit Minecraft gameplay.

## Seaborn
Species from the ocean, powerful for their ability to unify and evolve.

But as players, we can manage to beat them, collect tissues and mterials from them and make equipments that contains the power from the ocean.

And as skilled travlers, we can also eat them! However, you may pay for your not treating their meat well.

## Evolution

Seaborn contact and find ways to fulfill their drawback, which make them stringer and invulnerable.

With the process of evolution, they'll get more HP, higher attack damage, more skills, and a bigger crowd.

Keep up with them, or it'lll be too late to stop them!

## Relics

Mysterious objects that influce your game.

Ways to obtaining most of them are WIP.

## Future plan

- Food and Pets;
- Blocks and enviroment for nethersea brand and sea;
- Regression of Seaborn under evolution;
- Fountain of Ecology;
- The Caerula Arbor;
